title: The Company
description: A mod adding a few items from Lethal Company
body:
A simple mod that adds a few items from Lethal Company

**NOTE: CURRENTLY ALL ITEMS ARE ONLY OBTAINABLE IN CREATIVE**

A lot of the art is made by someone I met on discord, the only way I can find to credit them is their commision card, so here it is: [https://witchdaggercomm.carrd.co](https://witchdaggercomm.carrd.co)

---------------------------------
If you want to see more mod projects like this, Check out my Twitch, where I make mods suggested by chat: [https://www.twitch.tv/modman337](https://www.twitch.tv/modman337)

You can also suggest things and report bugs on my discord: [https://discord.gg/MwjqnG3UqD](https://discord.gg/MwjqnG3UqD)
